title: Pricing Architecture Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger pricing architecture foundations judgment so finance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Pricing Architecture Foundations is a leverage point inside finance. It supports the broader goal of cash flow, runway, margins, pricing, and unit economics.
coreConcepts: Pricing Architecture Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good pricing architecture foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Pricing Architecture Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
